metadata.purpose: Track directory and citation link submissions
metadata.note: All submissions require human action — real business info needed

directories.name: Google Business Profile
directories.notes: Register as 'Rich Dad Retirement - Financial Education'. Needs real address (can use service area business).

directories.name: Bing Places
directories.notes: Import from Google Business Profile once set up

directories.name: BBB (Better Business Bureau)
directories.notes: All 3 competitors have BBB links. Major trust signal. Requires business verification.

directories.name: Crunchbase
directories.notes: Free company profile with website link

directories.name: LinkedIn Company Page
directories.notes: Create company page for Rich Dad Retirement. Link to website.

directories.name: YouTube Channel
directories.notes: Even empty channel with About section linking to site is valuable. Competitors have significant YouTube presence.

directories.name: Medium
directories.notes: Republish articles with canonical tags pointing to richdadretirement.com. Augusta has 5 links from Medium.

directories.name: Substack
directories.notes: HIGHEST PRIORITY. See substack-launch-plan.md. Birch Gold has 100 dofollow links from here.

directories.name: Reddit (u/TheIRAAdvisor)
directories.notes: Participate genuinely in r/retirement, r/personalfinance, r/GoldIRA. Build karma before posting links. Profile bio links to site.

directories.name: Quora
directories.notes: Answer retirement/gold IRA questions. Profile links to site. Answers can cite our articles.

directories.name: Apple Maps Connect
directories.notes: Only if registered as a business with physical/service area

directories.name: X/Twitter (@TheIRAAdvisor)
directories.notes: Already exists. Needs active engagement — reply to retirement discussions, share articles.
